name: Buy.NSW Goods and Supplies Marketplace
description: Rules for goods and supply procurements available through the Buy.NSW marketplace and whole-of-government standing offers.
source: NSW Procurement Policy Framework; Buy.NSW Platform Policy

pre_checks.title: Check Buy.NSW marketplace first
pre_checks.body: The Buy.NSW online marketplace (buy.nsw.gov.au) provides access to pre-approved suppliers with pre-negotiated pricing across many goods categories including office supplies, furniture, equipment, and more. Check the marketplace before approaching suppliers directly.

pre_checks.title: Check whole-of-government standing offers
pre_checks.body: A range of whole-of-government standing offers and common use contracts exist for frequently purchased goods categories. Contact your agency's procurement team to check what standing offers apply to your category.

obligations.title: Use Buy.NSW marketplace where available
obligations.body: For goods available on the Buy.NSW marketplace, use of the marketplace is the preferred approach. Direct procurement from other suppliers when marketplace options exist requires documented justification.
obligations.policy: NSW Procurement Policy Framework; Buy.NSW Platform Policy

obligations.title: Consider sustainability and ethical sourcing
obligations.body: NSW Government procurement should consider environmental sustainability (energy efficiency, recyclability, packaging) and ethical sourcing (labour standards, supply chain integrity) when purchasing goods. Document consideration of sustainable options.
obligations.policy: NSW Government Sustainability Policy; Sustainable Procurement

pathway_overrides.if_arrangement_exists: Use Buy.NSW marketplace or standing offer

steps: Search Buy.NSW marketplace for available products and pre-approved suppliers
Check for whole-of-government standing offers in this goods category
If marketplace option available: purchase through marketplace process
If no marketplace option: proceed with recommended pathway below
